list.pageDescription: AI-generated resumes tailored from your career knowledge base.

emptyState.title: No resumes yet
emptyState.description: Generate your first AI resume. Gemini will read your complete career profile and produce a tailored, professional document.

new.pageDescription: Gemini will read your complete career profile — experiences, projects, skills, and stories — and produce a tailored, professional resume.

generationSteps.step1: Reading your experience, projects, and stories…

resumeType.heading: Resume Type
resumeType.description: Each type tells Gemini which skills and experiences to prioritize.
resumeType.targetRoleDescription: The more specific, the better the tailoring.
resumeType.professionalTitleDescription: Shown under your name in the resume header — e.g. "Senior 3D Artist".
resumeType.targetRolePlaceholder: Senior 3D Artist — Architectural Visualization at Gensler

contact.heading: Contact Details
contact.description: Appears in the resume header. Email is pulled from your account.
contact.hint: Save these once in Profile → Resume Defaults so they're prefilled every time.

submit.helperText: Takes 15–30 seconds. Gemini reads your complete career profile.

targetJob.heading: Targeting: {role} at {company}
targetJob.description: The posting's keywords and required skills will guide the resume (current match: {matchScore}%). Only your real data is used.

pagination.count: {count, plural, one {# page} other {# pages}} · US Letter (8.5×11in)

editor.pickExperienceTitle: Add an experience from your profile
editor.noMoreExperiences: All your saved experiences are already included.
editor.pickProjectTitle: Add a project from your profile
editor.noMoreProjects: All your saved projects are already included.
editor.showProjectsSection: Show the Projects section on this resume
